subcodes.first_line: O Word of Victory! Bear thou witness unto that which God hath testified in the Dominion of Eternity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا کلمة النصر فاشهد بما شهد الله فی جبروت البقاء
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
